name: Country Garden Tortellini Salad
recipeIngredient: 8 Ounces Frozen Asparagus Spears (Thawed), in 1-inch pieces
6 Ounces Frozen Snow Pea Pods, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and drain the tortellini without any fat or salt. Rinse with cold water and drain well.
2. Steam carrots for 3-5 minutes, or until crisp-tender.
3. Combine the cooked tortellini, steamed carrots, cherry tomatoes, asparagus, pea pods, onions, and radishes in a large salad bowl.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining ingredients (water, lemon juice, cider vinegar, olive oil, pepper, and salt) and stir well to mix.
5. Pour the dressing mixture over the tortellini salad and toss gently to coat evenly.
6. Cover the bowl and chill in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
Yield: 11 servings (1 cup each)
Exchanges:
1/2 Medium Fat Meat
1 Vegetable
1 1/2 Starch
